Criteria / Elements: (1) Conduct live demonstration; (2) Project progress against the negotiated schedule; (3) Demonstration of the project; (4) Plan for completion.
Excellent: Conduct demonstration of current project progress
Good: Conduct demonstration of current project progress
Fair: Conduct demonstration of current project progress
Poor: Describe the current project progress, without a demonstration

Excellent: Project is ahead of or on-track according to the negotiated schedule
Good: Project is on-track according to the negotiated schedule
Fair: Project is marginally behind the negotiated schedule
Poor: Project is very behind the negotiated schedule

Excellent: Demonstrate a minimally viable solution to the project
Good: Demonstrate substantial progress towards a minimally viable solution to the project
Fair: Demonstrate satisfactory progress towards a minimally viable solution to the project
Poor: No substantial live demonstration

Excellent: Describe a feasible plan for completion of the project by the scheduled demonstration date.
Good: Describe a feasible plan for completion of the project by the scheduled demonstration date.
Fair: Describe a plan for completion of as much of the project as possible by the scheduled demonstration date.
Poor: Describe a plan for completion of as much of the project as possible, by the scheduled demonstration date.

Criteria / Elements: (1) Progress of the extended infrastructure, robot software architecture, and/or implementation; (2) Plan for completion of the extended work.
Excellent: Extended work is ahead of or on-track according to the negotiated schedule. Describes a feasible plan for completion of the extended work.
Good: Extended work is on-track or marginally behind according to the negotiated schedule. Describes a plan for completion of as much of the extended work as possible.
Fair: Extended work is behind according to the negotiated schedule. Describes a plan for completion of as much of the extended work as possible.
Poor: Extended work and/or plan is substantially incomplete.

Excellent: Prepared an approved Activity Risk Assessment. Reasonable risks are captured.
Poor: Activity Risk Assessment was not approved by the Week 12 update date.

Criteria / Elements: (1) Conduct live demonstration; (2) Quality of the demonstration towards the negotiated project requirements; (3) Delineation of work from existing literature, software and dependencies; (4) Preparedness of the demonstration, including setup time, configuration, restarts, and delays.
Excellent: Excellent demonstration that clearly shows that the project meets the negotiated requirements.
Good: Good demonstration that mostly shows that the project meets the negotiated requirements, but minor aspects of the project may have issues or errors.
Fair: Sufficient demonstration that shows that the project meets the majority of the negotiated requirements, but significant aspects of the requirements are missing.
Poor: A demonstration is conducted that shows that final state of the project, however, the demonstration does not meet minimal requirements.

Excellent: Demonstration clearly distinguishes the student's work from existing literature, software and dependencies.
Good: Demonstration distinguishes the student's work from existing literature, software and dependencies, with minor issues.
Fair: Demonstration may not satisfactorily distinguish the student's work from existing literature, software and dependencies, however, the work is satisfactorily original.
Poor: The student's work is not distinguished from existing literature, software and dependencies.

Excellent: Demonstration is well-prepared, is conducted live, and fully ready to be conducted.
Good: Demonstration is mostly well-prepared, and is conducted live. Minimal time is lost for issues.
Fair: Demonstration is prepared, and is conducted live. Significant time is lost for issues.
Poor: Demonstration is ill prepared, and not conducted live. Demonstration significantly depends on supplementary material or recordings.

Criteria / Elements: (1) Quality of the demonstration and discussion of the evaluation of the work against the negotiated requirements.
Excellent: Excellent discussion of the evaluation of the work, that clearly presents the strengths and weaknesses.
Good: Good discussion of the evaluation of the work, that presents the strengths and weaknesses.
Fair: Satisfactory discussion of the evaluation of the work, with a minimally satisfactory coverage of the strengths and weaknesses.
Poor: Attempt at discussing of the evaluation of the work.

Excellent: Conducts a demonstration of some results.
Good: Conducts a demonstration of some results.
Fair: May conduct a demonstration of minimal results.

Criteria / Elements: (1) Teamwork Organisation: regularity activity, timeframe of completion of tasks; (2) Teamwork Contribution: quality, and regularity; (3) Teamwork Communication: regularity and suitability.
Excellent: Team member has significant activity, and regular completion of tasks over the entire course of the assessment as evident in project materials.
Good: Team member has satisfactory activity, and regular completion of tasks for the majority of the assessment as evident in project materials.
Fair: Team member has some lack of regular activity, and/or late completion of tasks at times during the assessment, as evident in project materials.
Poor: Team member has sporadic or late activity, and/or an untimely completion of tasks, throughout the assessment as evident in project materials.

Excellent: Team member has significant and regular contribution to project over the entire course of the assessment as evident in project materials.
Good: Team member has satisfactory and regular contribution to project for the majority of the assessment as evident in project materials.
Fair: Team member has some lack of regular contribution to the project at times during the assessment as evident in project materials.
Poor: Team member has some contribution to the project, but the contributions are minimally sufficient and on an irregular basis throughout the assessment, as evident in project materials.

Excellent: Team member maintains regular communication with the other team member(s) as evident in project materials.
Good: Team member maintains satisfactory communication with the other team member(s) as evident in project materials.
Fair: Team member has some lack of regular communication with the other team member(s) at times during the assessment.
Poor: Team member has minimal, inconsistent and/or irregular communication with the other team member(s).

Criteria / Elements: (1) Description of methodology and approach towards completing the negotiated requirements of the project; (2) Technical description of project including software, launch files, configuration, and implementation; (3) Description of the implemented software; (4) Description and Justification of the choice of Robot Software Architecture; (5) Analysis of the software capabilities.
Excellent: Excellent description of methodology, providing a complete picture of how the project is completed.
Good: Good description of methodology, providing a mostly complete picture of how the project is completed, with some minor questions remaining.
Fair: Satisfactory description of methodology, providing how the project is completed, with some important questions remaining.
Poor: The report is minimally attempted but does not provide a suitable picture of how the project is completed.

Excellent: Excellent and complete technical description of the ROS package components.
Good: Good and mostly complete technical description of the ROS package components. Some details are missing.
Fair: Fair technical description of the ROS package components. Important details are missing, without which the package cannot be sufficiently understood.
Poor: Attempt at describing the ROS software, but it is sparse, poorly described, and significantly incomplete.

Excellent: Excellent and complete description of the Robot Software Architecture, with excellent justification with well-supported reasoning.
Good: Good and mostly complete description of the Robot Software Architecture, with good justification however, there are some flaws.
Fair: Fair description of the Robot Software Architecture with a satisfactory justification. The choice is suitable, however, the reasoning is missing critical information.
Poor: Attempt at describing and justifying the choice of Robot Software Architecture, however, there are better approaches, and/or the description is poor and significantly incomplete.

Excellent: Excellent analysis of the final deliverable, providing a clear understanding of software capabilities, with supporting evidence.
Good: Good analysis of the final deliverable, providing an understanding of the software capabilities, with supporting evidence, but has some flaws.
Fair: Satisfactory analysis of the final deliverable, but has a limited understanding of the software capabilities, but has important gaps, and limited supporting evidence.
Poor: Minimal to no analysis of the final deliverable, with minimal supporting evidence.

Criteria / Elements: Specific consideration of extended work of implemented: (1) ROS2 Infrastructure (2) Robot Software Architecture (3) Additional algorithms/methods
Excellent: The implementation constituting the extended work is clear.
Good: The implementation constituting the extended work is clear.
Fair: The implementation constituting the extended work is satisfactorily separate.
Poor: The implementation constituting the extended work is satisfactorily separate.

Excellent: Satisfies the Excellent category of Methodology and Analysis above.
Good: Satisfies the Good category of Methodology and Analysis above.
Fair: Satisfies the Fair category of Methodology and Analysis above.
Poor: Satisfies the Poor category of Methodology and Analysis above.

Criteria / Elements: (1) Quality of written report, including figures and tables; (2) Appropriate citation and referencing; (3) Inclusion of Log of the use of AI tools.
Excellent: Report is well-written and adheres to the academic writing practices. Figures and tables are clear and legible.
Good: Report is mostly well-written and adheres to the academic writing practices, with minor issues. Figures and tables are legible.
Fair: Report is satisfactorily written and can be satisfactorily understood. Some figures and tables are provided, it is not easy to interpret their relevance.
Poor: Report does not adhere to the academic writing practices, but is readable. Figures and tables may be missing.

Excellent: All relevant literature and dependent software is fully cited, with a consistent and legible referencing format.
Good: All relevant literature and dependent software is fully cited, with a consistent and legible referencing format.
Fair: Most relevant literature and dependent software is correctly cited with a consistent and legible referencing format.
Poor: Some relevant literature and dependent software is correctly cited with a consistent and legible referencing format.

Excellent: Log of the use of AI Tools is provided.
Good: Log of the use of AI Tools is provided.
Fair: Log of the use of AI Tools is provided.
Poor: Log of the use of AI Tools may not be provided.
